chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-327 of 2026 Zainul-Ul-Abdin Lashari v. Province of Sindh and others. Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For orders on CMA No.1186/2026 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA No.1187/2025 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2026 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2 to 4. The petitioner has approached this Court seeking appointment under the deceased Quota in Government Service under the erstwhile Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. It is pertinent to note that the Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan, in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad v. Muhammad Jalal (PLD 2024 Supreme Court 1276), has declared such provisions to be ultra vires the Constitution. In view of the above authoritative pronouncement, learned counsel for the petitioner has been unable to distinguish the present case or to point out any lawful basis to grant the relief sought. Consequently, no writ can be issued for facilitating employment on the grounds claimed by the petitioner. According, the instant petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
